recommendations.title: How It Ends
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Thriller, Mystery, Action, Adventure
recommendations.overview: A desperate father tries to return home to his pregnant wife after a mysterious apocalyptic event turns everything to chaos.

recommendations.title: A Single Shot
recommendations.overview: The tragic death of a beautiful young girl starts a tense and atmospheric game of cat and mouse between hunter John Moon and the hardened backwater criminals out for his blood.

recommendations.title: No Limit
recommendations.overview: Roxana Aubrey decides to drop her studies and escape her life in Paris for a free diving course in the south of France. She is quickly pulled into a life that reaches new depths brought by the weight of an ocean's descent.

recommendations.title: Zapped!
recommendations.overview: Peyton and Barney are fun loving high school students working on a science project with white mice. When one of the mice begins to move food toward itself with out touching it, Barney finds he has accidently discovered a formula for telekinetic power

recommendations.title: In the Land of Women
recommendations.overview: After a bad breakup with his girlfriend leaves him heartbroken, Carter Webb moves to Michigan to take care of his ailing grandmother. Once there, he gets mixed up in the lives of the mother and daughters who live across the street.

recommendations.title: Purple Hearts
recommendations.overview: An aspiring musician agrees to a marriage of convenience with a soon-to-deploy Marine, but a tragedy soon turns their fake relationship all too real.

recommendations.title: Mass
recommendations.overview: Two couples meet for a painful and raw conversation in the aftermath of a violent tragedy.

recommendations.title: Foxfire
recommendations.overview: The story of five teenage girls who form an unlikely bond after beating up a teacher who has sexually harassed them. They build a solid friendship but their wild ways begin to get out of control.

recommendations.title: Rush Hour
recommendations.overview: When Hong Kong Inspector Lee is summoned to Los Angeles to investigate a kidnapping, the FBI doesn't want any outside help and assigns cocky LAPD Detective James Carter to distract Lee from the case. Not content to watch the action from the sidelines

recommendations.title: Begin Again
recommendations.overview: Gretta, a budding songwriter, finds herself alone after her boyfriend Dave ditches her. Her life gains purpose when Dan, a record label executive, notices her talent.
